story.title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
story.summary: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.
story.selection_reason: The meeting between Trump and Xi has significant implications for global trade, security, and diplomacy, affecting multiple countries and regions.
